languages.text: {n}Пристрелявшиеся лэнсы не знали промаха. А меровский полк добивал искалеченных тварей, если вдруг чудовищам везло пережить удар. Абеляр признал позднее, что эта кампания стала образцовым примером взаимодействия {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Имперского флота{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Пристрелявшиеся лэнсы не знали промаха. А меровский полк добивал искалеченных тварей, если вдруг чудовищам везло пережить удар. Абеляр признал позднее, что эта кампания стала образцовым примером взаимодействия {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Имперского флота{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пристрелявшиеся лэнсы не знали промаха. А меровский полк добивал искалеченных тварей, если вдруг чудовищам везло пережить удар. Абеляр признал позднее, что эта кампания стала образцовым примером взаимодействия {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Имперского флота{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures from fortified positions if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the orbital strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the Imperial Navy and the Astra Militarum.{/n}

{n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures from fortified positions if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the orbital strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the Imperial Navy and the Astra Militarum.{/n}

{n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures from fortified positions if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the orbital strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the Imperial Navy and the Astra Militarum.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ランス・ガンナーは一発も外さなかった。モンスターが幸運にも攻撃を生き延びたならば、メローヴ連隊が傷ついた生き物を仕留めた。アベラルドは後にこのキャンペーンを{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海軍{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタム{/g}の協力の完璧な例として語った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ランス・ガンナーは一発も外さなかった。モンスターが幸運にも攻撃を生き延びたならば、メローヴ連隊が傷ついた生き物を仕留めた。アベラルドは後にこのキャンペーンを帝国海軍とアストラ・ミリタムの協力の完璧な例として語った。{/n}
{n}ランス・ガンナーは一発も外さなかった。モンスターが幸運にも攻撃を生き延びたならば、メローヴ連隊が傷ついた生き物を仕留めた。アベラルドは後にこのキャンペーンを{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海軍{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}アストラ・ミリタム{/g}の協力の完璧な例として語った。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los artilleros de lanza no fallaron ni un disparo y el regimiento de Merov remató a los pocos monstruos que sobrevivieron al ataque. Más adelante, Abelard describiría la campaña como un ejemplo perfecto de cooperación entre la {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Armada Imperial{/g} y el {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los artilleros de lanza no fallaron ni un disparo y el regimiento de Merov remató a los pocos monstruos que sobrevivieron al ataque. Más adelante, Abelard describiría la campaña como un ejemplo perfecto de cooperación entre la Armada Imperial y el Astra Militarum.{/n}

languages.text: {n}光矛炮组弹无虚发，侥幸存活的怪物则由梅罗夫军团清扫殆尽。阿贝拉德后来称，这场战役是{g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}帝国海军{/g}与{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}协同作战的完美典范。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}光矛炮组弹无虚发，侥幸存活的怪物则由梅罗夫军团清扫殆尽。阿贝拉德后来称，这场战役是帝国海军与星界军协同作战的完美典范。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Während die Lanzenschützen jedes Ziel mit tödlicher Präzision trafen, gab das Merov-Regiment den verstümmelten Kreaturen den Rest, die das Glück hatten, den Angriff zu überleben. Abelard beschrieb diesen Feldzug später als perfektes Beispiel für eine Kooperation der {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}imperialen Flotte{/g} mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Während die Lanzenschützen jedes Ziel mit tödlicher Präzision trafen, gab das Merov-Regiment den verstümmelten Kreaturen den Rest, die das Glück hatten, den Angriff zu überleben. Abelard beschrieb diesen Feldzug später als perfektes Beispiel für eine Kooperation der imperialen Flotte mit dem Astra Militarum.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mızrak nişancıları, tek bir atışı bile kaçırmadı. Merov Alayı ise saldırıdan sağ kurtulacak kadar şanslı olup sakat kalanların işini bitirdi. Abelard, sonraları bu seferi {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}İmparatorluk Donanması{/g} ile {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} arasındaki iş birliğinin mükemmel bir örneği olarak tanımladı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mızrak nişancıları, tek bir atışı bile kaçırmadı. Merov Alayı ise saldırıdan sağ kurtulacak kadar şanslı olup sakat kalanların işini bitirdi. Abelard, sonraları bu seferi {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}İmparatorluk Donanması{/g} ile {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} arasındaki iş birliğinin mükemmel bir örneği olarak tanımladı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les artilleurs ne manquèrent aucun de leurs tirs, et le régiment de Merov se chargea d'achever tous les monstres mutilés qui avaient eu la chance de survivre aux frappes. Plus tard, Abélard décrivit cette campagne comme « un parfait exemple de coopération entre la {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Marine Impériale{/g} et l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} ».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The lance gunners did not miss a single shot, while the Merov Regiment finished off the maimed creatures if the monsters had been lucky enough to survive the strike. Abelard later described this campaign as a perfect example of cooperation between the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperialNavyGlossary}Imperial Navy{/g} and the {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les artilleurs ne manquèrent aucun de leurs tirs, et le régiment de Merov se chargea d'achever tous les monstres mutilés qui avaient eu la chance de survivre aux frappes. Plus tard, Abélard décrivit cette campagne comme « un parfait exemple de coopération entre la Marine Impériale et l'Astra Militarum ».{/n}
